summary.map_once_comply_many: Each Lighthouse IAM control is mapped to NIST CSF, CIS Controls, and ISO/IEC 27001 references.

remediation_register.subject: svc_backup
remediation_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
remediation_register.control_objective: Service accounts have accountable owners and controlled privileges
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Verify the service account cannot perform unnecessary administrative or remote-access actions against critical systems.

remediation_register.subject: svc_backup
remediation_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
remediation_register.control_objective: Service accounts have accountable owners and controlled privileges
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Verify the service account cannot perform unnecessary administrative or remote-access actions against critical systems.

remediation_register.subject: svc_backup
remediation_register.risk_title: Privilege concentration across multiple high-value assets
remediation_register.control_objective: Identity attack paths are evaluated for blast-radius risk
remediation_register.remediation_action: Reduce privilege concentration, separate administrative duties, and validate whether access can be scoped by system or role.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run graph analysis and confirm high-value asset reachability and blast radius have decreased.

remediation_register.subject: Server Admins
remediation_register.risk_title: Privilege concentration across multiple high-value assets
remediation_register.control_objective: Identity attack paths are evaluated for blast-radius risk
remediation_register.remediation_action: Reduce privilege concentration, separate administrative duties, and validate whether access can be scoped by system or role.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run graph analysis and confirm high-value asset reachability and blast radius have decreased.

remediation_register.subject: svc_reporting
remediation_register.risk_title: High-privilege service account path to critical asset
remediation_register.control_objective: Service accounts have accountable owners and controlled privileges
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Verify the service account cannot perform unnecessary administrative or remote-access actions against critical systems.

remediation_register.subject: svc_reporting
remediation_register.control_objective: Dormant privileged accounts are identified and reviewed
remediation_register.remediation_action: Validate business need, disable or remove elevated access, and retain review evidence.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run privileged account activity review and confirm the account no longer retains unnecessary elevated access.

remediation_register.subject: Domain Admins
remediation_register.control_objective: Identity attack paths are evaluated for blast-radius risk
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run the privilege graph and verify the unnecessary administrative path to the high-value asset is removed or reduced.

remediation_register.subject: legacy.admin
remediation_register.control_objective: Dormant privileged accounts are identified and reviewed
remediation_register.remediation_action: Validate business need, disable or remove elevated access, and retain review evidence.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run privileged account activity review and confirm the account no longer retains unnecessary elevated access.

remediation_register.subject: Server Admins
remediation_register.control_objective: Identity attack paths are evaluated for blast-radius risk
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run the privilege graph and verify the unnecessary administrative path to the high-value asset is removed or reduced.

remediation_register.subject: Server Admins
remediation_register.control_objective: Identity attack paths are evaluated for blast-radius risk
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review access necessity, enforce least privilege, apply segmentation controls, and monitor privileged activity.
remediation_register.validation_method: Re-run the privilege graph and verify the unnecessary administrative path to the high-value asset is removed or reduced.

remediation_register.subject: svc_reporting
remediation_register.control_objective: Service accounts have accountable owners and controlled privileges
remediation_register.remediation_action: Assign a business and technical owner, validate purpose, rotate credentials, and reduce privileges.
remediation_register.validation_method: Confirm ownership is populated, business purpose is approved, and access remains limited to documented service requirements.

remediation_register.subject: sam.adams
remediation_register.risk_title: Delegated support access combined with active managed-asset session
remediation_register.control_objective: Privilege inheritance and toxic permissions are assessed
remediation_register.remediation_action: Review delegated rights, session monitoring, endpoint administrative controls, and separation-of-duties requirements.
remediation_register.validation_method: Confirm delegated support access is scoped, monitored, and separated from unnecessary administrative capability.
